i love him, i love him, i love him, i love him im gonna cry i miss him so much and ive got tons of drafts for him. this isn’t just a phase anymore. it drives me crazy when people mischaracterize him, but I know i do it a lot too in my bots. i am such a hypocrite. i love him sm he deserves the world i just wanna give him big hugs and kisses. AHHHHHH i miss him!!!!! he is such a wholesome character but often misunderstood i am gonna cry
